response.justification: While the candidate has strong senior-level software engineering experience and application-level performance optimization background, this role requires deep expertise in AI accelerator and SoC design that is entirely absent from the resume. The candidate's entire career has been exclusively software-focused with no hardware architecture, GPU optimization, silicon design, or AI workload expertise—critical requirements for a Principal Performance Architect in cloud infrastructure and AI hardware.
strengths: 15+ years of demonstrated technical leadership across multiple Staff/Senior roles, meeting the principal-level seniority requirement
Proven performance optimization at scale (Dunnhumby: handling millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency systems with high-performance databases)
Strong full-stack system architecture and infrastructure experience across distributed systems, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
concerns: Zero experience with AI accelerators, GPU architecture, SoC/IP modeling, or silicon design—the core technical focus of this role
Career entirely in application and systems software with no hardware-software co-design, deep learning workload optimization, or SIMD/MIMD architecture exposure
No background in hardware design tools, hardware profiling, or electrical engineering; latest AI mention is only AI-agent framework tooling, not accelerator optimization

key_factors.factor: AI accelerator and SoC design expertise
Hardware architecture and silicon optimization experience
